title: acosta aeolica
intro: Acosta aeolica, also known as Aeolanthus acostae, is a plant species native to Mexico. It is a flowering plant belonging to the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the mint family. Acosta aeolica has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, and its herbal preparations include teas and infusions made from its leaves, which are said to provide relief from nausea and improve overall digestion.
